title: From curriculum to cave crystals: Six UNI researchers push boundaries with award‑winning innovations
summary_en: Five UNI faculty members and one graduate student — representing fields from music and education to engineering and astrochemistry — have been awarded funding and support to advance early‑stage ideas through the university’s Intellectual Property and Innovation Disclosure Competition IV.
title_cn: 从课程开发到洞穴晶体研究：北爱荷华大学六名研究人员凭借获奖创新成果突破科研边界
